classification_detail: The -1 delta at P26J time was transient. tsl_odds_history.jsonl is a live JSONL file appended to by the daemon every 15 min. At 09:12Z on 2026-05-21, the file was in a transitional state: one match was at a gap_h boundary (edge of the 0-2h closing threshold). The daemon subsequently added more closing snapshots, recovering count to 223.
reason_inconclusive: tsl_odds_history.jsonl was not staged/committed at P26J time (in FORBIDDEN stage list). No git snapshot for exact file state at 09:12Z. Current count 223 > baseline 220 confirms no permanent data loss.
